emailMethods.description: The email address registered to a user for authentication.

fido2Methods.description: Represents the FIDO2 security keys registered to a user for authentication.

methods.description: Represents all authentication methods registered to a user.

microsoftAuthenticatorMethods.description: The details of the Microsoft Authenticator app registered to a user for authentication.

operations.description: Represents the status of a long-running operation, such as a password reset operation.

passwordMethods.description: Represents the password registered to a user for authentication. For security, the password itself is never returned in the object, but action can be taken to reset a password.

phoneMethods.description: The phone numbers registered to a user for authentication.

platformCredentialMethods.description: Represents a platform credential instance registered to a user on Mac OS.

softwareOathMethods.description: The software OATH time-based one-time password (TOTP) applications registered to a user for authentication.

temporaryAccessPassMethods.description: Represents a Temporary Access Pass registered to a user for authentication through time-limited passcodes.

windowsHelloForBusinessMethods.description: Represents the Windows Hello for Business authentication method registered to a user for authentication.
